title: Harry's Education (Legacy)
description: This mod adds all the feature from Minecraft Education!
body:
WARNING!

This mod is still under development all the features are only in survival. This mod contains missing features for now.

What this mod adds

- whole new chemistry feature
- Every block/ item from Minecraft Education Edition
- New worldbuilder blocks like Allow/ deny and Barrier walls
- Elements like sodium, boron etc.
- new chalkboard/ camera


  [My Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@harrylife0105?app=desktop)

FUTURE DEVELOPMENT

We are trying to add new blocks and items every month.

NEW VERSION OF HARRY'S EDUCATION COMING OUT SOON FOR NEOFORGE!
